avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
positioning: Empower your fitness journey with myfitness.sa's informative and supportive content.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the benefits of different fitness equipment and how to use them effectively.
Provide clear pricing and subscription information to address customer pain points.
Share informative content on local services and how they complement fitness routines.
Offer tips and tricks for maintaining a consistent workout schedule.
Educate on the importance of diverse fitness options and how to incorporate them into daily life.
research_requests: Analyze competitors like Fitness First ME to identify successful content strategies.
Survey current and potential customers to better understand their fitness needs and preferences.
Investigate emerging fitness trends to keep content relevant and engaging.
